title: Iteration History Record
description: Validates a single iteration history file written by the Improve mode loop orchestrator.

iteration_number.description: Iteration index. 0 is the baseline snapshot before any modifications.

score_percentage.description: Weighted overall score from the evaluator. Null for iteration-0 baseline.

delta.description: Score change from the previous iteration (score_percentage - previous score_percentage). Null for iteration-0 baseline.

criteria_results.description: Score vector from the evaluator — one entry per rubric criterion.

weight.description: Relative weight for this criterion. Defaults to 1.0 if not specified.

pass.description: Whether this criterion passed in this iteration.

evidence.description: Specific evidence supporting the pass/fail result (file path, line number, test output).

changes_made.description: Definition modifications applied during this iteration. Empty for iteration-0 and for the final iteration when threshold is met.

criterion_id.description: The criterion ID that motivated this change.

change.description: Description of the modification applied to the definition file or utility scripts.

file.description: Path to the file that was modified.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this iteration record was written.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes for this iteration (errors, special conditions, manual interventions).

git_commit.description: Git commit hash of the definition file at this iteration. Null if commit failed.
